close_reason: Resolved by using .turnkey isolation directory. Buck2 now outputs to buck-out/.turnkey/ which Go/Cargo/pytest automatically ignore. Implementation in turnkey-ihlp (buckconfig) and turnkey-b69x (tk wrapper).
description:
Native tools (go, cargo, uv) should exclude buck-out/ from their operations like build/test.

Currently 'go test ./...' picks up code from buck-out/v2/external_cells/bundled/prelude which causes spurious failures.

This should be handled by our tw wrappers, which we already use for dependency management. The wrappers should:
- Set appropriate exclusion patterns (e.g., -skip for go test)
- Or filter the package list to exclude buck-out/

Related: tw wrappers are currently focused on dependency sync, but could be extended to handle this.
title: Exclude buck-out/ from native tool operations
